content:textarea:3:12.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:3:12.html: The Salvation Army of Greenville County meets people where they are, providing shelter, food, clothing vouchers, and rental and utility assistance to those who need it most.
content:textarea:3:12.content: The Salvation Army of Greenville County meets people where they are, providing shelter, food, clothing vouchers, and rental and utility assistance to those who need it most.
content:textarea:3:12.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:43:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:text:17:8.name: Heading
content:text:17:8.html: Help Us Feed Those Who Are Hungry in Greenville, SC
content:text:17:8.content: Help Us Feed Those Who Are Hungry in Greenville, SC
content:text:17:8.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:43:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:18:35.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:18:35.html: Each year, hundreds of families and individuals come to us hungry. We provide food boxes from our food warehouse for those unable to make ends meet. We also serve three meals a day to the men, women, and children staying in our Shelters. If someone is in need of food, we do not turn them away.
content:textarea:18:35.content: Each year, hundreds of families and individuals come to us hungry. We provide food boxes from our food warehouse for those unable to make ends meet. We also serve three meals a day to the men, women, and children staying in our Shelters. If someone is in need of food, we do not turn them away.
content:textarea:18:35.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:43:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:37:41.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:37:41.html: You can also make a financial contribution designated specifically to help us purchase food to feed the hungry in our community. You can also donate on our website, or via check or money order to The Salvation Army. Please deliver attention Taylor Young, Director of Social Services, or to Kelly Holzer, Dining Hall Manager.
content:textarea:37:41.content: You can also make a financial contribution designated specifically to help us purchase food to feed the hungry in our community. You can also donate on our website, or via check or money order to The Salvation Army. Please deliver attention Taylor Young, Director of Social Services, or to Kelly Holzer, Dining Hall Manager.
content:textarea:37:41.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:43:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:38:71.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:38:71.html: Food donations are accepted at our Dining Hall on our Shelter campus at 417 Rutherford St. in Greenville. Donations are accepted in person from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m., Monday - Friday.
content:textarea:38:71.content: Food donations are accepted at our Dining Hall on our Shelter campus at 417 Rutherford St. in Greenville. Donations are accepted in person from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m., Monday - Friday.
content:textarea:38:71.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:43:20-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:39:51.html: Thank you for supporting our mission to serve those in need in Greenville, SC!
